summary: Completed testing of SoulNutri new features: News Feed, Weekly Report, and Motivational Achievements. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified with Playwright - all features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: News feed properly displays 8 pre-generated articles with verified sources (NHS, ANVISA, etc.)
Category filters working correctly (6 categories: curiosidade, alerta, dica, ciencia, tendencia, mito_vs_fato)
Achievements system shows 12 badges with progress tracking
Weekly report shows appropriate empty state when user has no meal data
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test PIN 1234 and pre-generated news items
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) News Feed (/api/news/*) - 8 items generated with AI verification, 6 categories, like/view tracking. 2) Achievements (/api/premium/achievements) - 12 badges, streak tracking, XP/level system, motivational messages. 3) Weekly Report (/api/premium/weekly-report-ai) - AI-generated analysis with macros. Frontend components: NutritionFeed.jsx, WeeklyReport.jsx integrated in App.js menu.

passed_tests: test_news_feed_returns_items - /api/news/feed returns 8 items with proper structure
test_news_feed_stats - Stats include total, by_category, by_tone
test_achievements_with_valid_pin - /api/premium/achievements returns badges, streak, level, messages
test_achievements_with_invalid_pin - Returns error for invalid PIN
test_achievements_badges_structure - Badge structure verified (id, nome, descricao, progress)
test_weekly_report_with_valid_pin - /api/premium/weekly-report-ai returns report or no-data message

frontend_verification.menu_options: Menu has 'Nutri News' and 'Relatorio Semanal' options with correct data-testid
frontend_verification.nutri_news_feed: Displays 8 news cards with categories (Alerta, Curiosidade, Mito vs Fato, Tendencia, Ciencia), like buttons, verified badges, source info, tags, confidence levels
frontend_verification.category_filters: All 6 filters present and functional (Todos, Curiosidade, Alerta, Dica, Ciencia, Tendencia, Mito vs Fato)
frontend_verification.weekly_report: Opens with tabs (Relatorio, Conquistas), shows empty state when no meal data
frontend_verification.achievements_tab: Shows level card (Iniciante, 0 XP), streak display (0 dias), 12 locked badges, motivational messages, next badge progress

achievements.level_system: 7 levels from Iniciante to Lenda SoulNutri
